# check-positioning rules. GENERATED FILE, DO NOT EDIT BY HAND.
#
# Generated by Vault/Design/sync-canonical.js
# from Vault/Design/canonical.json guard.rules, profile "sdk".
#
# Editing this file by hand is the defect it was built to remove: it would
# make the ban list a hand-typed copy of canon again. Every string here came
# from canonical.json. To change a ban, change canon and re-run the sync.
# check-positioning.sh verifies rules-sha256 below and will FAIL if you edit
# this file without regenerating.
#
# Fields, tab-separated: type<TAB>label<TAB>reason<TAB>pattern<TAB>include<TAB>exclude
#   type    literal | numeric | regex | dash
#   include git pathspec(s) to scan, "." for everything
#   exclude extra git exclude pathspec(s), "-" for none
#
# profile: sdk
# rules: 37
# generator-version: 1
# canonical-sha256: 29b036c0d1f86bbbdaa61f8d103097dff634d8fe73078cb3ac5b5a62472e66f1

numeric	2000 services	canonical services count is 2500+	2000 services	.	-
numeric	2500 services (no plus)	canonical format is '2500+ services', always with the plus sign	2500 services	.	-
numeric	200+ countries	canonical number countries is 145+	200\+ countries	.	-

numeric	12 tools	canonical published MCP tool count is 18	12 tools	.	:(glob,exclude)**/CHANGELOG.md
numeric	35 tools	phantom count; it was never a real state of any branch. Published count is 18	35 tools	.	-
numeric	90%+ of VoIP	unsupported claim; canonical success framing is 95%+	90%\+ of VoIP	.	-
literal	$0.02	canonical min price per code is $0.05	$0.02	.	-
literal	near-100	canonical success framing is 95%+	near-100	.	-
literal	Ranked #1	unverifiable ranking claim	Ranked #1	.	-
literal	#1 on	unverifiable ranking claim	#1 on	.	-
literal	#1 in	unverifiable ranking claim	#1 in	.	-
literal	not a reseller	untrue; VirtualSMS is HYBRID (own SIMs plus supplier aggregation)	not a reseller	.	-
literal	direct-sourced	untrue; inherits the 'not a reseller' false claim	direct-sourced	.	-
literal	agentic	canonical wording in a published description is 'AI agents', not 'agentic'	agentic	package.json setup.py pyproject.toml composer.json *.gemspec *.csproj *.nuspec server.json .plugin/plugin.json	-
literal	physical SIM infrastructure	infra leak; the SIM is the PRODUCT and is allowed, the infrastructure is not	physical SIM infrastructure	.	-
literal	modem	infra leak; never describe our hardware	modem	.	-
literal	SIM box	infra leak; never describe our hardware	SIM box	.	-
literal	our fleet	infra leak; never describe our fleet	our fleet	.	-
literal	our hardware	infra leak; never describe our hardware	our hardware	.	-
literal	our EU	infra leak; never reveal where our hardware sits	our EU	.	-
literal	ports across	infra leak; never reveal port or SIM counts	ports across	.	-
regex	SIM cards in <region>	infra leak; never say where our SIMs are	sim cards? in (the )?(european|eu|us|usa|europe|united states)([^a-zA-Z]|$)	.	-
regex	SIMs in <region>	infra leak; never say where our SIMs are	sims? in (the )?(european|eu|us|usa|europe|united states)([^a-zA-Z]|$)	.	-
regex	<region> mobile networks	infra leak; never say where our SIMs are	(european|eu|us|usa|europe|united states) mobile networks	.	-
regex	our <inventory> are in <region>	infra leak; never say where our fleet is	our (sims?|numbers|fleet|infrastructure|hardware) (are|is|sit|sits|live|lives) in	.	-
regex	our <supplier> fleet	supplier or infra leak; the whole SHAPE is banned, whatever fills the slot	our [a-z0-9._/-]+ fleet	.	-
regex	our <supplier> integration	supplier leak; naming who we integrate with reveals who supplies us	our [a-z0-9._/-]+ integration	.	-
regex	we source/buy/resell from	supplier leak; states the supply relationship in the active voice	we (source|buy|resell|purchase) (them |these |our |the )?(numbers |inventory |sims )?from	.	-
dash	em-dash or en-dash	not allowed in README; use a colon, comma or full stop	-	*README.md	-
dash	em-dash or en-dash	not allowed in a package manifest description; use a colon, comma or full stop	-	package.json setup.py pyproject.toml composer.json *.gemspec *.csproj *.nuspec server.json .plugin/plugin.json	-
